description: Q44 LTD will be replaced by Q44 SBS, following same route from Merrick Blvd in Jamaica to the Bronx Zoo, with fewer stops.

Q44 LTD will be replaced by Q44 SBS, operating at all times. SBS will follow same route as LTD from Merrick Blvd in Jamaica to the Bronx Zoo. Includes bus lanes, fare machines, curb regulation changes, and capital projects.
Q44 LTD will be replaced by Q44 SBS, following same route from Merrick Blvd in Jamaica to the Bronx Zoo, with fewer stops and bus priority features

Select Bus Service implementation on the Q44 corridor from Jamaica to Bronx Zoo via Main St/Cross Bronx Service Road, including bus lanes, improved fare collection, transit signal priority, passenger information, stations and amenities, and branding
Q44 Select Bus Service launched on November 29, 2015, as part of the Main Street project timeline
